penalties.description: Task was not completed - only 2 of 6 objects were transferred back to the left side when the video ended.

reasoning: Claude identified incomplete task completion with only 2 of 6 objects returned to the left side by video end, while GPT-4o reported full completion. Given the specific frame-by-frame analysis provided by Claude and the automatic zero penalty for incomplete tasks in the rubric, the incomplete task penalty is applied. This results in a total penalty deduction equal to the time score, yielding zero points.
